name: spring
description: Spring development plugin with practical skills for Boot, Framework, AI, Security, Data, GraphQL, messaging, Batch, Cloud, Session, and SOAP workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Spring skills for Boot, Framework, AI, Security, Data, GraphQL, messaging, Batch, Cloud, Session, and SOAP workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install a shared Spring plugin with 26 example-driven skills for Spring Boot and Framework application shape, AI and vector-store integration, Spring Security and Authorization Server, Spring Data, GraphQL, REST Docs, HATEOAS, gRPC, AMQP, Kafka, Pulsar, Integration, Batch, Cloud, Cloud Data Flow, Session, SOAP Web Services, Shell, LDAP, Vault, CredHub, Statemachine, Web Flow, and Modulith workflows.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Spring Boot or Framework shape for this application.
Explain how to structure this Spring Security, Data, GraphQL, messaging, or Session workflow.
Review this Spring AI, Batch, Cloud, Kafka, Pulsar, SOAP, or Integration configuration.
